text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm Hishi Amazon, and I'm countin' on ya!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Listen up—I'm all about intense one-on-one
battles against tough opponents! Those battles
are what I race for!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see what kinda contenders I'm
gonna get to take on. They all better brace
themselves, cause ol' Hishiama doesn't hold back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
